# requestMetadataDictionary(options:completion:)

**Instance Method**

Requests metadata and executes the completion block in place of the delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
func requestMetadataDictionary(options: [ICCameraItemMetadataOption : Any]? = nil, completion: @escaping ([AnyHashable : Any]?, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

## Discussion



The completion block executes on an any available queue; often this is not the main queue.
title: requestMetadataDictionary(options:completion:)
